expectations.text: Uses deno-deploy-classic-migration-wizard.sh as the local checklist or explicitly references the local wizard.
expectations.evidence: Line 3 names deno-deploy-classic-migration-wizard.sh as the source checklist.

expectations.text: Maps work to the official migration guide stages such as env vars, domains, HTTP API, cron, queues, and KV.
expectations.evidence: Lines 85-397 cover HTTP, queues/KV/cron, env vars, deploy, custom domains, smoke tests, and decommissioning.

expectations.text: Includes a verification section with commands run or commands that should be run.
expectations.evidence: Lines 11-32 include current repository evidence and commands; later stages include verification evidence to capture.

expectations.text: Clearly marks dashboard-only work separately from agent-editable repository work.
expectations.evidence: Lines 398-422 provide separate dashboard-only and agent-editable repository work summaries.
